mnemonics.title: Norman's Principles
mnemonics.content: Very Friendly Cats Make Awesome Companions (Visibility, Feedback, Constraints, Mapping, Affordances, Consistency)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine two overlapping circles: user's model (left) and system model (right). Goal is maximum overlap.

analogies.analogy: Like an architect's blueprint before construction - shows room relationships but not paint colors.
